ar_extensions: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS unaccent;

ar_function.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE f_unaccent(jsonb_path_query_array(string, '$.*[*]')->>value) = f_unaccent('Ripolles') ORDER BY section_id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_function.name: f_unaccent
ar_function.info: Used to remove accents from a text string. Useful for case-insensitive and accent-insensitive searches.

ar_function.add:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION data_relations_flat_st_si(data jsonb) RETURNS jsonb LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$
		SELECT jsonb_agg(section_tipo || '_' || section_id)
		FROM (SELECT rel->>'section_tipo' as section_tipo, rel->>'section_id' as section_id
			FROM jsonb_each(data) as component_data, jsonb_array_elements(component_data.value) as rel) t $$;
ar_function.drop: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS data_relations_flat_st_si CASCADE
ar_function.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_st_si(relation) @> '["oh1_3"]' ORDER BY section_id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_function.name: data_relations_flat_st_si
ar_function.info: Aggregates relation section_tipo and section_id into a flat string format (e.g., oh1_3) for easier indexing and searching.

ar_function.add:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION data_relations_flat_fct_st_si(data jsonb) RETURNS jsonb LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$
		SELECT jsonb_agg(from_component_tipo || '_' || section_tipo || '_' || section_id)
		FROM (SELECT component_data.key as from_component_tipo, rel->>'section_tipo' as section_tipo, rel->>'section_id' as section_id
			FROM jsonb_each(data) as component_data, jsonb_array_elements(component_data.value) as rel) t $$;
ar_function.drop: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS data_relations_flat_fct_st_si CASCADE
ar_function.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_fct_st_si(relation) @> '["oh25_oh1_3"]' ORDER BY section_id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_function.name: data_relations_flat_fct_st_si
ar_function.info: Aggregates relation from_component_tipo, section_tipo and section_id into a flat string format (e.g., oh25_oh1_3) for easier indexing and searching.

ar_function.add:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION data_relations_flat_ty_st_si(data jsonb) RETURNS jsonb LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$
		SELECT jsonb_agg(type || '_' || section_tipo || '_' || section_id)
		FROM (SELECT rel->>'type' as type, rel->>'section_tipo' as section_tipo, rel->>'section_id' as section_id
			FROM jsonb_each(data) as component_data, jsonb_array_elements(component_data.value) as rel) t $$;
ar_function.drop: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS data_relations_flat_ty_st_si CASCADE
ar_function.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_ty_st_si(relation) @> '["dd151_oh1_3"]' ORDER BY section_id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_function.name: data_relations_flat_ty_st_si
ar_function.info: Aggregates relation type, section_tipo and section_id into a flat string format (e.g., dd151_oh1_3) for easier indexing and searching.

ar_function.add:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION data_relations_flat_ty_st(data jsonb) RETURNS jsonb LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$
		SELECT jsonb_agg(type || '_' || section_tipo)
		FROM (SELECT rel->>'type' as type, rel->>'section_tipo' as section_tipo
			FROM jsonb_each(data) as component_data, jsonb_array_elements(component_data.value) as rel) t $$;
ar_function.drop: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS data_relations_flat_ty_st CASCADE
ar_function.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_ty_st(relation) @> '["dd151_oh1"]' ORDER BY section_id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_function.name: data_relations_flat_ty_st
ar_function.info: Aggregates relation type and section_tipo into a flat string format (e.g., dd151_oh1) for easier indexing and searching.

ar_function.add:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION jsonb_values_as_text(j jsonb)
		RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE STRICT AS $$
			SELECT string_agg(value, ' ')
			FROM jsonb_each_text(j)
		$$;
ar_function.drop: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS jsonb_values_as_text CASCADE
ar_function.sample: SELECT tipo, term, jsonb_values_as_text(term) AS values_text FROM dd_ontology WHERE term IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5
ar_function.name: jsonb_values_as_text
ar_function.info: Aggregates all JSONB leaf values of the term column into a single searchable text string. Used by the ontology fuzzy search (similarity + trigram) to match human-readable text across all language keys.

ar_constraint.add: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS {$table} ADD CONSTRAINT {$table}_section_id_section_tipo_key UNIQUE (section_id, section_tipo);
ar_constraint.drop: ALTER TABLE {$table} DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS {$table}_section_id_section_tipo_key
ar_constraint.name: all_matrix_constraint_section_id_section_tipo_key
ar_constraint.info: Used to avoid duplicated records, it is not possible to store the same section_id with the same section_tipo

ar_constraint.add: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS {$table} ADD CONSTRAINT {$table}_tipo_key UNIQUE (tipo);
ar_constraint.name: dd_ontology_constraint_tipo_key
ar_constraint.info: Used to avoid duplicated records, it is not possible to store the same tipo

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_is_model_idx ON {$table} USING btree (is_model ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE is_model = 1 LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_is_model_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search if the term is a descriptor or not, possible values: 1|2. 1 = yes, 2 = no

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_model_idx ON {$table} USING btree (model COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE model = 'section' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_model_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search if the descriptor model

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_model_tipo_idx ON {$table} USING btree (model_tipo COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE model_tipo = 'dd6' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_model_tipo_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search for the descriptor model_tipo

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_order_number_idx ON {$table} USING btree (order_number ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE order_number = 2 LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_order_number_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search for the descriptor order_number

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_parent_idx ON {$table} USING btree (parent ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE parent = 'tch1' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_parent_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search for the descriptor parent

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_tld_idx ON {$table} USING btree (tld COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE tld = 'tch' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_tld_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search for the descriptor tld

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relations_idx ON {$table} USING gin (relations);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE relations @> ARRAY['tch'] LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_relations_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search for descriptor relations

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_is_translatable_idx ON {$table} USING btree (is_translatable ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE is_translatable = true LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_is_translatable_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search if the term is translatable or not, boolean values: true | false

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_is_main_idx ON {$table} USING btree (is_main ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE is_main = true LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_is_main_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search if the node is a main/root node (tipo = tld + 0), boolean values: true | false

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_parent_order_number_idx ON {$table} USING btree (parent COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST, order_number ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM dd_ontology WHERE parent = 'tch1' ORDER BY order_number LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_parent_order_number_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search descriptors by parent and order_number

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_term_jsonpath_idx ON {$table} USING gin (term jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT tipo FROM dd_ontology WHERE term @? '$.* ? (@ like_regex "oral" flag "i")' LIMIT 5
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_term_jsonpath_idx
ar_index.info: GIN index on dd_ontology.term using jsonb_path_ops. Powers the JSONPath @? pre-filter phase of fuzzy ontology search, enabling fast regex-like matching across all language keys.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_term_trgm_values_idx ON {$table} USING gin (jsonb_values_as_text(term) gin_trgm_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT tipo, similarity(jsonb_values_as_text(term), 'oral') AS score FROM dd_ontology WHERE jsonb_values_as_text(term) % 'oral' ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5
ar_index.name: dd_ontology_term_trgm_values_idx
ar_index.info: Trigram GIN index on jsonb_values_as_text(term). Powers the similarity/fuzzy search in dd_ontology_db_manager::search_fuzzy_term(), using the % operator for fast pre-filtering and similarity() for ranking.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_section_id_idx ON {$table} USING btree (section_id ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE section_id = 5 LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_section_id_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by section_id ordered ascendant.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_section_tipo_idx ON {$table} USING btree (section_tipo COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE section_tipo = 'oh1' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_section_tipo_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by section_tipo ordered ascendant.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_section_tipo_section_id_desc_idx ON {$table} USING btree (section_tipo COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST, section_id DESC NULLS FIRST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE section_id = 5 AND section_tipo = 'rsc197' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_section_tipo_section_id_desc_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by section_tipo ordered descendant by section_id.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_string_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (string jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE string @> '{"rsc85":[{"value":"Pere"}]}' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_string_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search string literals as full components data

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_date_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (date jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE date @> '[{"time":57958546}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_date_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search dates by any property.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_iri_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (iri jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE iri @> '[{"iri":"https://dedalo.dev"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_iri_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search IRI data by any of its properties, iri or title.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_geo_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (geo jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE jsonb_path_query_array(geo, '$.*[*]') @> '[{"lat":"39.462571"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_geo_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search geolocation data by any of its properties: lat, lng or alt.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_number_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (number jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE jsonb_path_query_array(number, '$.*[*].value') @> '[5]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_number_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search number data values.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_media_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (media jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE jsonb_path_query_array(media, '$.*[*]') @> '[{"original_file_name":"my_image.png"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_media_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search media data by any of its properties, original_file_name, or others.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_misc_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (misc jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE jsonb_path_query_array(misc, '$.*[*].value') @> '[{"section_tipo":"lg-spa"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_misc_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search miscellaneous data by any of its properties.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_search_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (relation_search jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE relation_search @> '[{"section_tipo":"es1"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_search_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relation all children data with specific parent. Give me all data indexed with a child using any of its parents.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (relation jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE relation @> '{"rsc91":[{"section_tipo":"es1"}]}' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations as components data

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_locators_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (jsonb_path_query_array(relation, '$.*[*]') jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE jsonb_path_query_array(relation, '$.*[*]') @> '[{"section_tipo":"es1"}]' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_locators_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations across all components data

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_flat_st_si_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (data_relations_flat_st_si(relation) jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_st_si(relation) @> '["dd64_1"]'::jsonb LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_flat_st_si_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations across all components data with a flat text of the relation such as es1_65

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_flat_fct_st_si_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (data_relations_flat_fct_st_si(relation) jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_fct_st_si(relation) @> '["oh33_dd64_1"]'::jsonb LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_flat_fct_st_si_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations across all components data with a flat text of the relation such as oh33_dd64_1

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_flat_ty_st_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (data_relations_flat_ty_st(relation) jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_ty_st(relation) @> '["dd151_dd64"]'::jsonb LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_flat_ty_st_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations across all components data with a flat text of the relation such as dd151_dd64

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_relation_flat_ty_st_si_gin_idx ON {$table} USING gin (data_relations_flat_ty_st_si(relation) jsonb_path_ops);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix WHERE data_relations_flat_ty_st_si(relation) @> '["dd151_dd64_1"]'::jsonb LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: all_matrix_relation_flat_ty_st_si_gin_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search relations across all components data with a flat text of the relation such as dd151_dd64_1

ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_activity_diffusion ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: matrix_activity_diffusion_id_desc_idx
ar_index.info: Drop-only cleanup: superseded by {$table}_pkey (btree on id). Kept so rebuilds remove the legacy duplicate index where it exists.

ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_activity ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: matrix_activity_id_asc_idx
ar_index.info: Drop-only cleanup: superseded by {$table}_pkey (btree on id), which serves the user_stats ORDER BY id ASC scans. Kept so rebuilds remove the legacy duplicate index where it exists.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_timestamp_composite_idx ON {$table} ("timestamp", id) INCLUDE (section_tipo, section_id);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_activity WHERE ("timestamp" >= '2024-12-04' AND "timestamp" < '2024-12-05') AND relation @> '{"dd543":[{"section_tipo":"dd128","section_id":"1"}]}'
ar_index.name: matrix_activity_timestamp_composite_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by timestamp, ordered id ascendant. Used by diffusion_section_stats:get_interval_raw_activity_data

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_timestamp_date_idx ON {$table} USING brin (DATE("timestamp"));
ar_index.drop:
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS {$table}_timestamp_idx; -- Intentional remove legacy index
		DROP INDEX IF EXISTS {$table}_timestamp_date_idx;
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE DATE("timestamp") = '2025-08-18' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_timestamp_date_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by date in time machine timestamp column.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_tipo_idx ON {$table} USING btree (tipo, id DESC);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE tipo = 'oh1' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_tipo_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by tipo.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_section_tipo_idx ON {$table} USING btree (section_tipo, id DESC);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine AS dd15 WHERE dd15.section_tipo = 'oh1' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 30 OFFSET 60
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_section_tipo_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by section_tipo in time machine.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_lang_idx ON {$table} USING btree (lang COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE lang = 'lg-spa' LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_lang_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by lang.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_bulk_process_id_idx ON {$table} USING btree (bulk_process_id ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE bulk_process_id = 751 LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_bulk_process_id_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by bulk_process_id.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_user_id_idx ON {$table} USING btree ("user_id" ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE user_id = 2 LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_user_id_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by user_id.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_si_bulk_st_tipo_lang_idx ON {$table} USING btree (section_id ASC NULLS LAST, bulk_process_id ASC NULLS LAST, section_tipo COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST, tipo COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST, lang COLLATE pg_catalog.default ASC NULLS LAST);
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE bulk_process_id = 751 LIMIT 1
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_si_bulk_st_tipo_lang_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by bulk_process_id with all parameters, section_id, bulk_process_id, section_tipo, tipo and lang.

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_search_default_idx ON "{$table}" (section_id, section_tipo, tipo, lang, "timestamp" DESC); ANALYZE {$table};
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_time_machine WHERE section_id = 1 AND section_tipo = 'oh1' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: matrix_time_machine_search_default_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by default parameters: section_id, section_tipo, tipo, lang, timestamp DESC

ar_index.add: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS {$table}_hierarchy41_value_idx ON "{$table}" ((string->'hierarchy41'->0->>'value')); ANALYZE {$table};
ar_index.sample: SELECT * FROM matrix_langs WHERE (string->'hierarchy41'->0->>'value') = 'eng' LIMIT 10
ar_index.name: matrix_langs_hierarchy41_value_idx
ar_index.info: Used to search by hierarchy41 value (lang code) in matrix_langs
